title: Lentiviral infection
steps: HL60/ATRA cells were seeded (2×10 4 cells per well) in 96-well plates (Corning Incorporated, NY, USA).

HA117 RNAi lentivirus was added to HL60/ATRA cells, or an HA117 overexpression lentivirus was added to RNAi lentivirus-transfected HL60/ATRA cells, in 100 μl of fresh RPMI-1640 containing 10% FBS and 5 μg/ml polybrene.
Twelve hours later, an equal volume of medium was added to each well.
Three days later, expression of the GFP gene was observed under a fluorescence microscope and the cells were collected for subsequent culture.
creator: Shuangshuang Li
